title: Chef's Bubble Feast
subtitle: Solo Developer | Gen AI Art | Mobile
description: A mobile bubble shooter game featuring AI-generated artwork, designed and developed entirely as a solo project and published on the Google Play Store.

highlights.name: Solo Development
highlights.detail: Designed, developed, and published the entire game as a solo project from concept to release.

highlights.name: Gen AI Art
highlights.detail: All game artwork was created using generative AI tools, enabling a rich visual style without a dedicated art team.

highlights.name: Mobile Release
highlights.detail: Successfully optimised and published on the Google Play Store.

roles: Solo Developer — full game design, programming, and publishing
Art direction and integration of generative AI artwork
details: Chef's Bubble Feast is a mobile bubble shooter game developed entirely as a solo project. All artwork was created using generative AI tools, allowing for a rich visual style without a dedicated art team. The game was designed, developed, and successfully published on the Google Play Store under the Krazy Kraken Games label.
